name: Maxvalu Tokai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Maxvalu Tokai Co.,Ltd. manages a chain of supermarkets. Its supermarkets offer food items. The company also operates Ion drip, a self-service drip coffee store; and online supermarket. The company was formerly known as K.K. Wada Shoji and changed its name to Maxvalu Tokai Co.,Ltd. in 2002. Maxvalu Tokai Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Sunto, Japan.
